title: Rep. Brad Schneider's Town Hall in Lake Forest
location: Lake Forest, Lake Forest, Lake Forest, IL 60045

title: Coghill for Congress -- Volunteer Training
description:
Good morning!
My name is Gregory, and I'm the Organizing Director for Coghill for Congress. I'm reaching out because you expressed an interest in volunteering with our campaign. Thank you!

Petitioning season has officially begun, and we will hold an online volunteer training on Tuesday, 12 August, from 6pm-7pm. This will be an opportunity to learn about the petitioning process, whether you're new to this or a seasoned pro.

Please join us on Tuesday to help get Morgan on the ballot. If you'd like to share the meeting link with anybody else who's interested, the more the merrier!

We look forward to seeing you next week!

All the best, 
Gregory Karr
Organizing Director, Coghill for Congress

Join with Google Meet: https://meet.google.com/xzc-agvj-ukn
Or dial: (US) +1 316-746-4155 PIN: 985407980#
More phone numbers: https://tel.meet/xzc-agvj-ukn?pin=5371828828503&hs=7

Learn more about Meet at: https://support.google.com/a/users/answer/9282720

title: Dylan for Illinois Volunteer Huddle
description:
Hey team,

This is the standing invitation for our Monday volunteer huddle!

In general, we will use these meetings to discuss key updates, messaging, social media, canvassing, fundraising, and upcoming events. 

I look forward to seeing you!

Warm regards,

Dylan T. Blaha (he/him)
Democratic Candidate (2026)
U.S. House of Representatives (IL-13)

title: Dylan Blaha for Congress - ALL VOLUNTEER MEETING
description:
We’re holding an ALL-VOLUNTEER Google Meet, meeting every Tuesday at 7 PM. Everyone is welcome – it’s a great way to meet and chat with Dylan, the rest of the team, your team leads, and staff.

The purpose of the meetings is to support Field Leads and answer their questions, introduce new volunteers, train together, and, of course, to touch base with Dylan.

Join with Google Meet: https://meet.google.com/nna-mzwy-acf Or dial: (US) +1 662-642-0130 PIN: 841387866# More phone numbers: https://tel.meet/nna-mzwy-acf?pin=8770582416694&hs=7 Learn more about Meet at: https://support.google.com/a/users/answer/9282720
